title: Aman Resorts India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Aman Resorts India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Aman Resorts India are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Kanpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Aman Resorts India:
Aman Resorts India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aman Resorts India!
